Our Breeding Philosophy

Excellence in every detail—health, temperament, and beauty for every Persian kitten.

View Kittens Learn More

What's Our Philosophy

Raising Kittens with Heart and Integrity

Home-Like Spaces

Kittens are raised in warm, home-like settings - so they grow up confident and social.

Learn more

Health & Safety

Clean, controlled environments maintained with veterinary-approved hygiene practices.

Learn more

Outdoor Play

Secure outdoor spaces where kittens can play and develop motor skills through exercise.

Learn more

Socialization

Daily human interaction and sensory exposure help kittens become emotionally balanced.

Learn more

What Makes Us Different?

  • Carefully selected bloodlines for health and beauty
  • Early socialization for gentle, loving companions
  • Transparent, supportive adoption process
  • Lifelong breeder support for every family
See Kittens

Kitten Development Protocol

A structured approach to raise well-rounded kittens
01.

Week 0–2

Kittens stay close to their mother, focusing on warmth, nursing, and bonding. We monitor health and begin gentle handling.

02.

Week 3–4

Eyes and ears open; kittens begin to walk. We introduce new textures to the kittens, gentle sounds, and human interaction daily.

03.

Week 5–8

Kittens explore more actively. We begin crate exposure, introduce solid food, and increase socialization with people.

04.

Week 9+

Kittens are ready to transition home. We offer support, resources, and guidance to families for continued development.

Our Health Guarantee

Every kitten is thoroughly examined by a licensed veterinarian, receives age-appropriate vaccinations, and is PKD-negative by parentage or testing. We provide a written health guarantee and lifetime support for every family.

  • Comprehensive health screening for all breeding cats
  • Genetic testing for PKD and other breed-specific conditions
  • Transparent health records and documentation
Lifelong Support & Community

Our commitment extends far beyond adoption. We offer guidance on nutrition, grooming, and care, and welcome all families into our supportive Persian cat community.

  • Ongoing advice for every stage of your cat’s life
  • Access to exclusive resources and educational materials
  • Invitations to community events and updates
